title: Mini Multiplayer Patches
description: A silly attempt at patching network related stuff on b1.7.3.
body:
A silly attempt at patching some _client-side_ network related stuff on b1.7.3.  

Currently it fixes some networking issues, tries to patch some inconsistencies, fixes *most of* the entity movement issue, logs chat messages to client console (like modern), fixes death screen not sending quit packets (exactly what [DeathQuitFix](https://modrinth.com/mod/DeathQuitFix/) did)...

> It will have some improvements when installed server-side, but it's not required.

Needs **[Babric](https://babric.github.io/)**  
Compatible with **[F3Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/F3Mod)**
